conflict: The weight of being known — each crew member alone with the collapse of their protective anonymity
consequence: Each crew member privately reckons with exposure; physical separation mirrors emotional fracture; but the parallel structure shows them doing the same thing apart — already a family even in rupture
must_land_beats: Jet at a bar counting water stains on the ceiling — the question is not 'was I responsible' but 'did I choose not to see'
Spike on a rooftop smoking, thinking about Ayane and Julia, unable to retrofit compassion he did not feel
Faye in a bath house floating in water — the vertigo of not being the only version of herself
Ed on the Bebop with Ein, talking in a monologue, then going quiet at the orphanage entry record — 'That was a long time ago, huh'
pressure_source: The weight of being known — each crew member alone with the collapse of their protective anonymity
state_shift: Each crew member privately reckons with exposure; physical separation mirrors emotional fracture; but the parallel structure shows them doing the same thing apart — already a family even in rupture
